title: Epigram. On Hearing that Morse Did Not "Invent" the Telegraph
content:
First they said it would not do;
        But, when he got through it,
    Then they vowed they always knew
        That he didn't do it!
    Lies are rolling stones, of course,
    But they can't adhere to MORSE.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, George Pope Morris delivers a powerful performance in "Epigram. On Hearing that Morse Did Not "Invent" the Telegraph"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
